text:
Xiaoya Gu
Xiaoya Gu is a Chinese language educator with experience teaching learners from middle school to university in both China and the U.S. She has served as a Language Lecturer at Shanghai New York University since 2019. Previously, she taught Chinese at the Confucius Institute of MTSU and conducted summer Chinese courses at Shanghai University of Finance and Economics. Her teaching focuses on creating engaging, culturally rich, and effective language learning experiences.
Education
MA, Teaching Chinese as a Second LanguageShanghai University of Finance and Economics
BA, Teaching Chinese as a Second LanguageHangzhou Normal University

text_blocks.text: Xiaoya Gu is a Chinese language educator with experience teaching learners from middle school to university in both China and the U.S. She has served as a Language Lecturer at Shanghai New York University since 2019. Previously, she taught Chinese at the Confucius Institute of MTSU and conducted summer Chinese courses at Shanghai University of Finance and Economics. Her teaching focuses on creating engaging, culturally rich, and effective language learning experiences.
